name: bpoxcel-website
description: BPOXCEL Website - Recruitment & BPO Workforce Partners

scripts.build:css: cleancss -o css/style.min.css css/style.css && cleancss -o css/popup.min.css css/popup.css
scripts.build:js: terser js/common.js -o js/common.min.js --mangle --compress && terser js/main.js -o js/main.min.js --mangle --compress && terser js/jobs.js -o js/jobs.min.js --mangle --compress && terser js/popup.js -o js/popup.min.js --mangle --compress
scripts.build: npm run build:tailwind && npm run build:css && npm run build:js
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run watch:tailwind" "npm run watch:css" "npm run watch:js"
